timestream.table.retentionproperties.Cfn: Retention properties contain the duration for which your time-series data must be stored in the magnetic store and the memory store.

timestream.table.retentionproperties.Mag.Description: The duration for which data must be stored in the magnetic store.

timestream.table.retentionproperties.Mem.Description: The duration for which data must be stored in the memory store.
